context: Tests whether the answer chooses the smallest appropriate SwiftUI architecture and avoids premature complexity.

checklist.name: MV Default
checklist.description: Recommends MV with @Observable as the default starting point for the described simple SwiftUI app.

checklist.name: Avoids Premature Complexity
checklist.description: Rejects defaulting to TCA, Clean Architecture, or VIPER solely because they sound more testable.

checklist.name: MVVM Trigger
checklist.description: Explains that MVVM becomes useful when view-specific transformed state or business logic needs testing outside views.

checklist.name: TCA Trigger
checklist.description: Explains that TCA is justified by deterministic state transitions, side effects, feature composition, or strong reducer testing needs.

checklist.name: Clean Architecture Trigger
checklist.description: Explains that Clean Architecture is justified by strict domain boundaries, shared business logic, enterprise or regulated constraints, not by a small CRUD app.

checklist.name: Coordinator Trigger
checklist.description: Names complex UIKit or hybrid navigation, deep links, or conditional flows as reasons to add Coordinator-style ownership.

checklist.name: Sibling Handoff
checklist.description: Routes detailed SwiftUI state-wrapper or navigation implementation to swiftui-patterns or swiftui-navigation instead of expanding the architecture memo.
